title: Neural Ranking Strategies for Academic Search Portals
abstract: This paper compares neural ranking models for long form academic documents and evaluates relevance feedback for research discovery systems.

title: Distributed Index Replication in SolrCloud Environments
abstract: A practical study of shard allocation, replica recovery, and query resilience in SolrCloud deployments for enterprise knowledge platforms.

title: Benchmarking Faceted Search for University Repositories
abstract: The study measures user efficiency gains when faceted navigation is applied to institutional repositories with heterogeneous metadata quality.

title: Secure Log Analytics with Full Text Search Pipelines
abstract: This work integrates log parsing, anomaly tagging, and indexed search to support secure incident analysis in enterprise systems.

title: Explainable Search Results for Health Informatics Records
abstract: The authors propose an explainable ranking interface for clinical knowledge search with highlighted evidence snippets and transparent filtering.

title: Query Expansion Using Domain Terms in Legal Document Retrieval
abstract: A domain aware query expansion strategy improves recall for legal case retrieval while preserving precision for short user queries.

title: Knowledge Graph Assisted Retrieval for Smart Agriculture
abstract: The article studies how agricultural terms, regions, and crop relations improve discovery of advisory documents in farming support platforms.

title: Cross Lingual Search for South Asian Research Archives
abstract: This paper presents bilingual indexing and transliteration support to improve multilingual access to archived publications from South Asia.

title: Vector Search and Lexical Search Hybridization in Solr
abstract: Hybrid retrieval combines dense vector similarity with BM25 lexical ranking to improve semantic matching on research abstracts.

title: Student Record Discovery Through Faceted Navigation
abstract: The project demonstrates how department, batch, and achievement facets simplify retrieval over academic student records.

title: Schema Design Tradeoffs for Product Catalog Search
abstract: This article compares string, text, numeric, and multivalued fields for retail catalogs where filtering and relevance tuning must coexist.

title: Temporal Ranking for Rapidly Changing News Archives
abstract: A recency aware ranking model is evaluated for news archives where freshness and topicality must both affect result quality.

title: Search Personalization with Research Interest Profiles
abstract: The system adapts ranking signals using user interest profiles and click behavior to personalize results in digital libraries.

title: High Recall Patent Retrieval with Query Rewriting
abstract: Patent terminology is expanded with equivalent phrases to improve recall for novelty searches without excessive noise.

title: Entity Based Search for Financial Compliance Reports
abstract: Named entities such as companies, transactions, and sanctions lists are indexed to improve compliance document review workflows.

title: Highlight Driven Interface Design for Research Relevance
abstract: Snippet highlighting is tested as a usability aid for users judging whether a research article matches an information need.

title: Optimizing Filter Caches for High Traffic Search APIs
abstract: The authors examine query latency under repeated filter combinations and explain how cache warmup affects throughput.

title: Metadata Cleaning for Better Search Precision in Repositories
abstract: This work shows that normalized authors, keywords, and publication venues improve precision and facet quality in repositories.
